# Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Virginia
Region: US-VA
Citation: Consumer Data Protection Act
Authority: Virginia General Assembly
Source URL: https://law.lis.virginia.gov/vacode/title59.1/chapter53/
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, automated_decision_making, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Virginia CDPA, VCDPA, consumer rights, sensitive data, data protection assessment, targeted advertising, 弗吉尼亚

## Summary
Virginia comprehensive privacy law with controller and processor duties, consumer rights, opt-out rights, sensitive-data consent, and data protection assessments.

## Key compliance obligations
- Limit collection to adequate, relevant, and reasonably necessary data.
- Provide consumer rights and an appeal process.
- Execute processor contracts and conduct assessments for high-risk processing.
